ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( bpats__Stage__r.bpats__Sequence__c = 6, OR( ISBLANK( Verbal_Offer_Approved_By__c ), ISBLANK( Verbal_Offer_Approval_Date__c ), ISBLANK( Requested_Start_Date__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Before moving to the Offer stage, the fields Verbal Offer Approved By, Verbal Offer Approval Date, and Requested Start Date must be filled out on the Applicant record.
